followSteps: Please Follow the Steps Below to Continue
completeFace: To complete face authentication on iTrust, kindly follow these steps:
point1: Install the iServe App (On Customer Device)
point1Desc: Download and install the iServe app from the Play Store.
point2: Install the FaceRD Service App (On Customer Device)
point2Desc: Open the iServe app and install the Aadhaar FaceRD app and follow the FaceAuth steps.
point3Desc: Refresh status in iTrust and continue.
